input.background: A researcher conducts a survey to learn about the sexual behavior of college students on a particular campus. A list of the undergraduates at the university is used to select participants. The investigator sends out 500 surveys but only 136 are returned.
input.question: Consider how the low response rate could bias the results of this study.

output.answer: The high nonresponse rate hinders our ability to make generalizations about the population; the distribution of behaviors in responders may not randomly reflect behaviors in the campus populations.
